headlines.description: Brentford picked up their first home win in nine games on Saturday in an eventful 4-2 victory against 10-man Brighton & Hove Albion, aided by two goals and an assist from Bryan Mbeumo.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brentford see off Brighton in 4-2 thriller as Mbeumo shines

headlines.description: Bournemouth had to settle for a 0-0 draw against Crystal Palace in the Premier League at Selhurst Park on Saturday, with the hosts having been reduced to 10 men late in the first half after defender Chris Richards was sent off for a second yellow card.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bournemouth held to 0-0 draw at 10-man Palace

headlines.description: Manchester City moved a step closer to Champions League football next season, scoring twice in the final five minutes to claim a 2-0 Premier League win over Everton.
headlines.shortLinkText: City boost top four hopes with late win at Everton

headlines.description: Southampton moved closer to avoiding the all time lowest Premier League points total with a late 1-1 draw against West Ham United on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: So'ton tie lowest points total in draw at West Ham

headlines.description: Aston Villa thumped top-five rivals Newcastle United 4-1 at Villa Park to keep themselves in the thick of the race for Champions League qualification on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villa hit four past Newcastle to strengthen UCL bid
